message:
refactor(mobile): Use custom event for FAB search trigger

Replace simulated keyboard event with custom DOM event for triggering
the spotlight search from the mobile Floating Action Button.

Before:
  window.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent("keydown", { key: "k", metaKey: true }))

After:
  window.dispatchEvent(new Event("jfp:open-spotlight"))

Why this is better:
- Custom events are more reliable than simulating keyboard events
- Aligns with existing pattern in Providers.tsx (line 36)
- SpotlightSearch.tsx already listens for "jfp:open-spotlight" (lines 302-303)
- Removes dependency on browser-specific keyboard event handling
- More explicit intent - we want to open spotlight, not simulate a keypress

This ensures consistent behavior across:
- Desktop: ⌘K / Ctrl+K keyboard shortcut (native)
- Mobile: FAB search button (custom event)
- Nav: Search button click (custom event via Providers.tsx)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
